MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT VLADIMIR BELFOR Motion to Vacate Default and quash the service Wells Fargo Bank claims it effectuated. Appearances: Anne M. Schauerman, Esq. Office of the General Counsel Wells Fargo Bank, (626) 965-9465, Appearing thru CourtCall for Plaintiff and opposing party. There are no other appearances.
